federation.note: The shared multi-intolerance health-diary RDF model (Brief 1A of the coeliac-app build) — typed accessors + SHACL for Meal / FoodItem / Exposure / Symptom / TriggerClass (evidence-prior lag profiles) / EliminationProtocol / ToleranceConclusion / GeneticSummary / DietPlan, plus deriveExposures (OFF allergen/trace/additive tags + ingredient-text sulphite aliases + a high-risk-category → possible-undeclared fallback) and an owner-only fail-closed ACL helper. Reuses schema.org / OWL-Time / PROV-O / Dublin Core; new terms under diet: (https://w3id.org/jeswr/sectors/health/diet#), a sub-module of the health sector (vocab authored in parallel in solid-federation-vocab, Brief 1B). SECURITY-CRITICAL: models health data (symptoms, genetics summary, restriction plan) — all pod resources are owner-only, fail-closed. GitHub-installable now (committed dist/, ignore-scripts=true); npm publish is a deferred migration.
